GPIO Controller Base: 0x0001070000000800 (phys)
RX_DAT:    0x0000000000067910
TX_SET:    0x0000000000020010
TX_CLEAR:  0x0000000000020010

GPIO  BIT_CFG            tx_oe xor output_sel pin  LABEL
----  ------------------  ----- --- ---------- ---  -----
1     0x0000000000000001  1     0   0          0    eth0 pair-mode
2     0x0000000000000000  0     0   0          0    eth0 power-en
3     0x0000000000000000  0     0   0          0    eth1 pair-mode
4     0x0000000000000000  0     0   0          1    eth1 power-en
5     0x0000000000000000  0     0   0          0    eth2 pair-mode
6     0x0000000000000000  0     0   0          0    eth2 power-en
7     0x0000000000000000  0     0   0          0    eth3 pair-mode
9     0x0000000000000000  0     0   0          0    eth3 power-en
10    0x0000000000000000  0     0   0          0    eth4 power-en
16    0x0000000000000000  0     0   0          0    misc-unknown
18    0x0000000000000000  0     0   0          1    unknown

=== All GPIOs BIT_CFG (offset: 0x100 + n*8) ===
GPIO  OFFSET   RAW                OE XOR OSEL PIN
